steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage states that factors contributing to the Caribbean ground sloth's extinction "may be applicable to endangered species today." The blank must describe past lessons in a way that captures this idea of fitting and transferring to the current situation.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'idiosyncratic': means uniquely peculiar, the opposite of broadly applicable. ✗
  • Choice B — 'simplified': describes how information is presented, not whether it applies to today's challenges. ✗
  • Choice C — 'relevant': means applicable to and mattering for the current situation — exactly what "applicable to endangered species today" signals. ✓
  • Choice D — 'debatable': implies uncertainty about the lessons' value, contradicting the passage's confident claim. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
